programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF attempts to clear an American businessman in Japan of false charges that he murdered his Japanese wife in "Butterfly," a segment of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible" series.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Phelps falls in love with a woman that the IMF has been assigned to bring out of an iron curtain country over the seemingly insurmountable obstacles set in their way by the country's secret police in the "Decoy"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Before the IMF can get the prototype of an Iron Curtain country's secret weapon to the United States, part of the weapon falls into the hands of an unscrupulous, greedy nightclub owner, in "The Amateur"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: While rescuing an imprisoned patriot, Barney is critically wounded and must be left behind in order for the IMF to complete their mission in the "Hunted" episode of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Phelps poses as an archeology professor and Dana as one of his graduate students, as the IMF goes to the aid of a group of young guerilla fighters in an effort to obtain from them a notebook containing vital scientific information in "The Rebel"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A leading illegal supplier of heroin is dying of cancer and is about to designate a successor and turn over to him the only known list containing all the vital information about the entire drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Paris, still in his cover from a completed mission, is kidnapped and held hostage by a group of treacherous revolutionists in "The Hostage" on Paramount Television's award-winning series "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A political boss hires a professional provocateur to stage a violent protest, in a maneuver to discredit his state's governor and elevate his puppet, the mayor, to the governorship in "Takeover"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Hari Rhodes guest stars as George Corley, an underworld leader whose link with a police precinct chief is the object of Barney's brother's newspaper crusade in "Cat's Paw"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF devises an elaborate scheme to dupe foreign agent James Reed into stealing a bogus missile guidance system in "The Missile"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Henry Darrow guest stars as Gregory Tolan, the local leader of a revolutionist group specializing in robberies for the financing of a movement to overthrow the United States government in the "Blast"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: With the threat of another off-shore missile crisis and perhaps a confrontation that could lead to war, the IMF is called upon to expose a nuclear arms treaty secretly signed by a previously friendly country and a hostile power in "The Catafalque"

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film of a bird family, and an origami artist demonstrates how to make paper birds and puppets. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, a puppet couple, Betty and James, adopt a baby daughter.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits pediatrician Dr. Jane Breck, who shows young viewers what might happen during a child's routine checkup. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Cousin Mary Owl plans a cousin reunion!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about how children are curious about families that are formed by adoption and talks about his family's adoption of his own sister. He shows a film about different families in his Neighborhood.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Sea World to see the families of penguins there. He talks about how every person in the world is different from everybody else. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, the cousin reunion takes place.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers builds several things on the sand table and talks about different ways to play. He shows a video of some of the many ways children like to play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At Chef Brockett's bakery, Eva Kwong's grandmother makes special Chinese dumplings, and Mister Rogers talks about how children can learn about so many things from adults.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how people make wooden rocking horses. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Mr. Aber gets a mask that makes him look like King Friday, and the Neighbors talk about the importance of making and keeping friends.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows viewers a kitten named Jimmy and a film of Jimmy's birth, and assures viewers that "it's all right to wonder about things." Then, poet and essayist May Sarton visits.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers invites viewers along on a visit to a special new playground designed and built by both adults and children. He makes up a song at the piano.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces his television Neighbors to gymnast Chaney Umphrey when he visits at his gym and watches as he exercises. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, mischievous Lady Elaine Fairchilde reveals a mystery!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a toy factory where people make plastic molded tricycles, and he receives a visit from folk singer Ella Jenkins who collects toy tops from around the world.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers flies a balsa wood airplane, and Mr. McFeely visits an airport control tower. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Prince Tuesday discovers that learning to ride a bike isn't always easy!

programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how empty containers plus some imagination can create a whole Neighborhood. In Make-Believe, Ana Platypus is jealous of Prince Tuesday's new bike and angry because her parents aren't buying one for her.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a toy lending library and sees children playing with different kinds of toys. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Prince Tuesday learns to ride his bike, and also learns to share it!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers hangs a fish mobile, then goes to see some killer whales swim and play. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Lady Elaine teaches dance and says males weren't invited to the studio because they don't dance.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Sam Weber and sees him dance. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday XIII goes to Lady Elaine's dance school, and she turns him away claiming that men can't dance. Sam Weber arrives and dances.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers helps to weave a scarf. Henrietta Pussycat's ballet teacher, Miss Cloud, does not speak but communicates with movement. The Junior Tamburitzans perform two folk dances. Mister Rogers talks about making up stories and dances.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a dog. Bob Trow stops by with the Bob Dog costume. Prince Tuesday fears that the change will be permanent. Neighbor Aber arrives to explain that the switch is just temporary.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a clown mask. "Mayor" Sara prepares a speech as two lost clowns arrive. To help the clowns find their way to the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Queen Sara suggests that she and Mayor Maggie trade jobs.

programme.desc: Nancy Caterpillar sees herself in a mirror and realizes that she is very special the way she is. She turns into a butterfly. Mister Rogers visits the circus and sees Jeff Gabel apply his clown make-up.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Some toys transform into valuable collectibles and become iconic classics; Adam sees how Play-Doh is created, visits the mecca of pinball manufacturing, learns how Slinkys keep springing back, and gets an inside look at Lionel trains.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Adrenaline runs high when Adam Richman visits the factory where Yamaha makes ATVs, WaveRunners and more; an inside look at a company built to get people sky-high in paramotors; amusement park Diggerland USA; mech-suits; submarine built for two.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Some machines built for sheer spectacle.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Nuclear submarines carry more firepower than all bombs dropped in history; since the 1950s, these steel vessels became U.S. defense cornerstones, sparking Cold War underwater competition and creating engineering miracles for deterrence.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Nuclear research ranges from well-known applications, such as bombs and reactors, to little-known uses in medicine, food preparation, and radiation detection. It's also spawned ancillary technologies to store nuclear waste and clean up accidents.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The most dangerous snakes, sports, weather events; America's most dangerous volcano; tornado hazards; base jumping.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: It strikes without warning and kills in an instant; we fear its might even as we use it to save a life; explore the electric shock in its numerous forms.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Begun in 1817, the Erie Canal was an engineering wonder of 363 miles of water highway linking the western frontier to the Atlantic seaboard; it took eight years to construct and thousands of hours of brutal labor.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The construction of the 51-mile canal that took ten years to build and employed over 40,000 workers, 6,000 of whom died of yellow fever, malaria, and other horrors; an earlier, nine-year attempt by the French ended in failure and cost 20,000 lives.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A large factory-fishing boat hunts down, catches and processes 300 tons of Alaskan pollock each day in the Bering Sea; the crew reveals the inner workings of one of the most sophisticated and complex vessels afloat.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.desc: ¿Qué vamos a hacer? Dora y Botas ayudan al Gallo Rojo a subir a la colina más alta para que pueda despertar al Sol. En el camino, practicaremos haciendo mucho ruido.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Dora y Botas conocen a Roberto, un robot con un cinturón de herramientas, luces, poderes de estiramiento y mucha fuerza. Pero Roberto está perdido y no encuentra a su abuelo. ¿Lo ayudamos?

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Benny, el toro, encuentra una varita mágica y se convierte en una papa por accidente. Dora y Botas deberán llevar la papa al Joven Mago para que Benny pueda ser un toro otra vez.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Viaja al espacio exterior junto a Dora y Botas y ayúdalos a regresar a cinco criaturas espaciales de vuelta a su casa en el Planeta Púrpura.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¿A dónde van los juguetes perdidos? ¡A la Ciudad Perdida! Pero esta ciudad es difícil de encontrar. Dora y Botas se lanzan a la aventura para recuperar el osito de peluche favorito de Dora.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Conozcan a Diego, el primo de Dora. Diego trabaja en el Centro de Rescate de Animales. Puede hacer el sonido de los animales y hablar con los animales salvajes.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Guau, Guau! Dora y Botas tienen un nuevo videojuego en el que un perrero mete a todos los cachorritos en jaulas. Para salvarlos, Dora y Botas tendrán que entrar en el videojuego.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Dora y Botas leen un cuento sobre Kinkajou, una linda criatura del bosque, la cual está destinada a ser rey. Pero Kikajou pierde su corona porque no sabe las palabras mágicas 'Por Favor'.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Dora, Botas y Diego necesitan devolverle un bebé dinosaurio gigante a su mamá en la Isla Dinosaurio. Es una aventura prehistórica llena de diversión.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Hoy, Botas puede hacer lo que quiera porque es su día especial. Su cosa favorita en el mundo es ir a visitar a su papá al trabajo. ¡El papá de Botas está construyendo un parque de diversiones!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: El Camión de Rescate llega al Centro de Animales de Diego para dejar un animalito perdido: ¡un pingüino! Es el trabajo de Dora, Botas y Diego llevar a Pingüino hasta su casa en el Polo Sur.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: La prima de Dora, Daisy, jugará en un partido de fútbol que se trasmitirá por la televisión. Pero al equipo le falta una jugadora. Daisy le pide a Dora que sea ella quien complete el equipo. ¡Corre, Dora, corre!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Es Halloween y Dora y Botas salen a pedir dulces hasta que un lindo monstruito los sorprende. Dora y Botas lo acompañan a llegar a casa antes de que las agujas del Gran Reloj marquen las doce.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¿Qué viene luego del Fin? Dora y Botas están terminando un cuento de hadas y llegan a su fin. Se preguntan qué pasa después y usan su imaginación para continuar la historia.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Oh, no! Tres de nuestros amigos están en problemas. El bebé Jaguar está atrapado en un árbol, Isa cayó en un pozo de arena y Benny está atrapado en el Géiser Pegajoso. ¿A quién rescatamos primero?

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Dora y Botas están haciendo una pijamada! Es la hora de irse a dormir y Dora tiene su osito de peluche, pero Botas no puede encontrar a su dinosaurio. ¡Oh, no! Su dinosaurio debe haberse caído de su mochila cuando estaban en el parque.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Es la hora de una fiesta! A Dora y Botas los invitaron a la Gran Fiesta del Pollo Rojo. Habrá comida tonta, juegos tontos, y hasta bailes tontos. Pero, ¡el Gran Pollo Rojo ha perdido su pastel!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Oh oh! Botas tiene un hoyo en su bota, pero Dora sabe lo que debe hacer. ¡Vamos a la máquina arreglatodo!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: A Botas le encanta el béisbol. Le encanta correr, lanzar y atrapar la pelota. Pero hasta ahora, nunca pudo batear. Dora y Botas tendrán un juego de béisbol y Botas está determinado a batear por primera vez en su vida.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A handful of gold sends Luffy hurtling towards his death, Sanji and Usopp mount a midair rescue mission, and Nami prepares for an electrifying showdown with God Eneru!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp arrives just in time to save Nami from a lethal thunderbolt, but even their combined powers are no match for Eneru. While they scramble for an escape route, Sanji stealthily searches for a way to sabotage god’s ark!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Despite being slowed by an arm encased in gold, Luffy races up a giant beanstalk on a mission to settle the score with Eneru! Elsewhere, the people of Skypiea feel the jolt of god’s wrath!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A flashback offers a glimpse at the lives of two legendary figures in Skypiea’s history: Montblanc Noland and the ferocious warrior Kalgara!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The look back at the legend of Montblanc Noland and Kalgara the warrior continues with the story of how these two very different men suddenly found friendship – and then lost it just as quickly!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Montblanc Noland and the warrior Kalgara succeed in settling their difference before parting ways, but the laws of nature and man conspire to keep them apart – permanently!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Eneru strikes Angel Island with a devastating lightning bolt, and Luffy continues his heroic climb up the giant beanstalk. The rubber-man refuses to stop until he rings the golden bell – no matter what the cost!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Eneru continues his thunderous barrage, Nami hatches a plan to give Luffy one more shot at a grudge match with god. Zoro’s at the center of the scheme, but he might not survive his mission!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami’s quick thinking gets Luffy closer to god, and the Straw Hat captain launches himself into the center of a sinister storm! Can he find a way to destroy Eneru’s looming cloud of death?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Luffy’s epic battle with Eneru, sunny skies chase away the storms, and the cloud-dwelling citizens of Angel Island turn their attention to rebuilding their homeland.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin attempts to decipher the riddle of a mysterious poneglyph, Usopp barters with the locals, and Luffy raids the priceless treasures of the legendary city of gold!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With a little help from their new friends – and a giant octopus – the Straw Hats bid farewell to Skypiea and begin their descent back to the deep blue sea. Where they’ll land is anyone’s guess!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After a frightening fall from the clouds, the Straw Hats find themselves trapped inside an impenetrable Marine stronghold. The crew gets separated, the Going Merry is impounded, and rumors of ghosts run rampant!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Nami searches for the Going Merry, Luffy and Sanji pose as famous chefs, only to end up competing in a cooking contest with a beautiful mistress of the galley!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro is imprisoned and interrogated, and Chopper’s ill-chosen hiding spot lands him in the operating room along with a doctor who can’t stand the sight of blood!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s insatiable appetite betrays his true identity, and yet another member of his crew ends up in the brig when two Straw Hats try to fool Commander Jonathan with the same disguise!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Commander Jonathan sets a Straw Hat trap, but Luffy and Sanji are willing to risk it all to help spring their mates. Will a souvenir from the sky save the day – or will their escape plan be scuttled by foul play?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his gang make a break for the docks, and Commander Jonathan deploys armed guards in an attempt to slow down the Straw Hats. Only one thing is certain: somebody is going down for the count!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats are surrounded, outnumbered, blasted with tear gas. Taking a pretty, young doctor hostage may be their only hope for surviving long enough for a Merry reunion!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew were almost in the clear when Nami made a horrifying discovery: the Marines stole their gold! Now, the Straw Hats must sail straight into the thick of the fight to reclaim their lost riches!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp hatches a plan for a moonlit raid on the Marine vault, but Commander Jonathan is has a nasty surprise waiting for the pirates! Meanwhile, Sanji and Nami attempt to recover the waver.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The extreme arrogance of a Marine special investigator clears a path for Luffy and company to make their escape! Unfortunately, the Straw Hats still have to find their gold before returning to the high seas!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats may think they’re in the clear, but Commander Jonathan has one final trap waiting to ground the Going Merry! If Luffy’s crew is to escape, they’ll need a helping hand – or eight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his mates survive and near-death encounter with some mischievous sea monkeys only to land on a mysterious island where everything is much longer than it should be!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After a loyal horse and his recently-returned master are assaulted by thugs, Luffy is drawn into a Davy Back Fight with the Foxy Pirates. The Straw Hat captain never backs down from a challenge, but this contest could cost him his crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Davy Back Fight begins with a treacherous Donut Race around Ling Ring Long Land! The Straw Hats square off against the Foxy Pirates in a battle to see who loses a crew member!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami uses her considerable skill as a navigator to put the Straw Hats on the verge of victory, but the captain of the Foxy Pirates has more than a few dirty tricks up his sleeve!

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan and Rev Bem help a peaceful society stand up to their would-be slavers. They have to be careful because if Dylan teaches them to kill, their kids will be born knowing it.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan attempts to bring peace to two different Nietzschean prides by escorting the princess of one to her arranged marriage to the prince of the other.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Rommie's avatar falls in love with what turns out to be the avatar of a warship named Gabriel. Gabriel attempts to infect Rommie with a virus that broadcasts its plans to the warship.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka takes the Andromeda to Tarn-Vedra, but extended time in the slipstream causes side effects. To combat them, Beka starts taking Flash and soon becomes addicted.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: An old memory from the Andromeda is accidentally activated, which sends her on a mission and leaves Dylan and the crew unable to override the command.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: With the Andromeda damaged by their deadliest enemies, Dylan and Rommie must rescue Tyr, Harper, and Rev from a Magog World ship.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan, Beka, Rev, and Tyr crash land after escaping a gang of Nietzscheans, but soon face a new threat: Rev's need to feed.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew must steal a jewel that is at the center of a feud between a Drift owner and the Than. Beka falls for a security chief who was formerly a thief.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda answers a distress call when a cargo ship is attacked. Meanwhile, Trance is interrogated after paying a visit to the people.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew looks for a long-lost Commonwealth leader who has gone into hiding. They find her, but one question remains: is it actually her?

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew is separated: Dylan, Beka, and Trance go with Rommie to find out about a new weapon being developed on a planet that is distrustful of AI; Harper, Tyr, and Rev struggle for survival when the Maru crashes into the ocean.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda is tasked with escorting medical ships safely through Drago-Kazov space.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A planet of Commonwealth survivors, led by Dylan's former fiance, is invited to join the new Commonwealth, but when they vote not to join, the Magog are suspected of playing dirty.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: An agent of the Abyss tries to lure Harper into joining the Magog.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: An early morning apartment fire in Fort Worth, Texas, sparks a murder investigation when a young woman's body is found beaten and bound inside; detectives quickly work to solve the case and uncover an elaborate plot fueled by revenge and greed.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After a mother and son are brutally attacked during a home invasion, Illinois police chase down several leads; they uncover a shocking motive with an occult leader and her loyal followers at the center of the crime.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a beloved mother goes missing on her birthday, detectives are faced with several possible suspects before focusing on a co-worker with a shocking past who will do anything to hide their true identity.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After a small-town man is found shot to death at a Missouri roadside park, the evidence trail leads detectives further into the man's complicated past where they uncover a wicked plot that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Police follow a lead in a missing persons investigation to a 115-acre farm, unearthing the site of a gruesome crime and a seductive killer that will go down in New Hampshire history.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A loving father agrees to give his ex-wife a chance to reconcile; when his loved ones can't reach him, an unexpected tip is brought to Oklahoma police that uncovers a toxic love triangle and horrific crime scene.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a beloved family man dies in a house fire, his wife and children must grapple with his unexpected loss.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a professional basketball star is gunned down in his hometown of Memphis, Tenn., the case goes cold for nearly a decade; after a new team of investigators takes over, it uncovers the missing murder weapon and a mastermind close to home court.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A 62-year-old man bails his stepdaughter out of jail for attempted murder and is soon found dead, but investigators learn his death may not be what it seems.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Texas Rangers are brought in to investigate the most recent death when a San Angelo, Texas, woman loses three romantic partners in the span of three years.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Years after a beloved father is accidentally shot in his home, the family matriarch mysteriously vanishes; as a second investigation launches, a shocking confession reveals a family secret about how far a son is willing to go for his mother.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A 911 call in an upscale neighborhood leads police to the bodies of a mother and daughter in what appears to be a murder-suicide; investigators discover a trail of deceit that exposes an unexpected killer.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A 32-year-old man vanishes in Fort Meyers, Fla., and police quickly link an abandoned, blood soaked vehicle to his case, but investigators must determine if this missing man is a victim or killer.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Investigators follow a surveillance trail to uncover the events that led to the death of an Arizona man, who is shot in his garage before he is able to read the results of a paternity test.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a loving father is gunned down in upstate New York, a hunt for the gunman crosses state lines; as several suspects are brought in, investigators must determine who's telling the truth to reveal the mastermind.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A Texas woman discovers her husband's brutally stabbed body in their ransacked home and police suspect he was the victim of a robbery gone wrong, but the investigation reveals a torrid love affair.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After what appears to be a fatal road rage incident, authorities in Clifton, Ariz., follow a trail of recovered text messages that suggest this was no random attack, but instead a cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Absolutely Fabulous
programme.desc: After exchanging words, Patsy and Edina (Joanna Lumley, Jennifer Saunders) look for new best friends. Lulu, Britt Ekland and Zandra Rhodes guest star.

programme.title: Absolutely Fabulous

programme.title: Absolutely Fabulous

programme.desc: The cast and crew plus a few celebrity guests share their memories of Britain's most-loved comedy.

programme.title: Light Up

programme.title: RiffTrax: Aladdin
programme.desc: Long before there was a terrible Disney live-action version of Aladdin, there was a terrible Disney live-action version of Aladdin! This feature is a parody and contains a comedic commentary by RiffTrax.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Voodoo Man
programme.desc: Young women are vanishing somewhere on the road that leads to the creepy old house of a deranged bachelor and his two lonely assistants. No one thinks to question the deranged bachelor and his two lonely assistants.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Swamp Of The Ravens
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this utterly baffling horror classic about a mad doctor who believes death is simply an evolution and that every woman wants to sleep with him.

programme.title: RiffTrax: The Sorcerers Apprentice
programme.desc: No, it's not the terrible Sorcerer's Apprentice movie with Nicolas Cage, come on, we wouldn't do that to you.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Little Shop of Horrors: Three Riffer Edition
programme.desc: Fans of shops of horrors will love this nostalgic look back, before the days of the massive chain stores, and big box horror shops.

programme.title: RiffTrax: The Little Unicorn
programme.desc: The Little Unicorn is a tale of whimsy, fantasy, and extremely generous definitions of the word “little.” Turns out making CGI little unicorns is way more difficult.

programme.title: RiffTrax Short: Act Your Age
programme.desc: Young Jim is caught in a shocking act of pencil-based vandalism, leading him to look deeply into the core of his soul and come to the inexorable conclusion that he is kind of a weenie.

programme.title: RiffTrax Short: Coffeehouse Rendezvous
programme.desc: The youth of today, no longer content to roll a hoop with a stick, play endless hours of mumbly peg, or work a lathe at a factory 14 hours a day for just pennies, need something to occupy them.

programme.title: RiffTrax Short: It Must Be The Neighbors
programme.desc: Bill Duncan had it all until the day when he discovered that his garbage cans had been deemed unfit for use by the city sanitation committee.

programme.title: RiffTrax Presents: Sherlock Holmes and the Secret Weapon
programme.desc: It's double-ya double-ya two and Sherlock Holmes once again faces Professor Moriarty - with nothing less than the future of England at stake! This feature is a parody and contains a comedic commentary by Mary Jo and Bridget from RiffTrax.

programme.title: RiffTrax: The Magic Sword
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 60's fantasy classic! Spells will be cast! Heroes will be born! Bones will be siezed!

programme.title: RiffTrax: The Retrievers
programme.desc: Tom Cathral is trying to publish a book, but one thing stands in his way! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin, and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends go to see a show at the Dead Moon Circus. But Momo starts acting peculiar and leaves, causing Chibi-Usa to become worried.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami falls in love with a melody she finds online. She works on lyrics that match the melody and also goes to meet the composer, Toshiyuki Nishino.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rei becomes famous after posing for a magazine. A girl named Nanako, expresses her desire to study under Rei so that she can become just like her.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Chibi-Usa go to the dentist to get their cavities treated. The dental clinic is actually a trap set up by Palla-Palla to find Pegasus.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Minako and Makoto compete to win the heart of Honjo, a young principal. But their rivalry starts to put a strain on their friendship.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa’s school is having a sports day. However, one of its main events is jumping over the vaulting box, which Chibi-Usa is not very good at.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa and Usagi befriend a young painter named Kamoi at the park. Kamoi is visited by Cere-Cere, who asks the man to paint a portrait of her.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa is curious to know why Pegasus is reluctant to tell her where he came from. When she confronts Pegasus with the question, he disappears.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Palla-Pall turns Sailor Chibi Moon into an adult and Sailor Moon into a child. Chibi-Usa turns into shock when Pegasus can no longer hear her.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The girls begin to suspect that Chibi-Usa is in love. Eager to know who the boy is, they try to get Chibi-Usa to talk, but with little success.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends help set up the stage for the Coming of Age Day ceremony. They befriend four girls who are actually the Amazoness Quartet.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Strange spider webs begin to appear all across the Juban District. The girls notice that these webs are all originating from the Dead Moon Circus.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Nehelenia sets her plan in motion by starting a solar eclipse that will leave the world in eternal darkness.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Dead Moon discovers that Sailor Chibi Moon was hiding Pegasus and captures her. Sailor Chibi Moon learns the history behind the Dead Moon's queen.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Nehelenia demands that Helios give up the Golden Crystal in exchange for Sailor Chibi Moon. The Sailor Guardians are struggling to defeat Zirconia.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Nehelenia regains her full power and proceeds to put the world into an eternal slumber.Sailor Moon tries to activate the power of the Golden Crystal.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Golden Crystal’s power defeats Nehelenia, pushing her back into the abyss. Nehelenia tries to take Sailor Chibi Moon with her.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends start their new lives as high school girls. Nehalennia breaks out of her prison to seek revenge against the Sailor Guardians.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Hotaru starts to age at an accelerated rate, from a baby to a young girl within days. She warns of coming danger that will soon befall Sailor Moon.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The city is being plagued by a strange illness that causes people to become obsessed with staring into the mirror for hours, even days.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Moon is left devastated after seeing Mamoru get abducted To make matters worse, Nehalennia’s action is starting to cause a time paradox.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Moon runs off to save Mamoru from Nehalennia. The rest of the Sailor Guardians try to go after her, but they fall victim to Nehalennia’s traps.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Chibi Moon and Sailor Saturn make it to Nehalennia’s palace, where Mamoru is being held prisoner. The two Guardians are unable to free him.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Mamoru tells Usagi that he’s accepted an offer to study abroad in the U.S., which will force them to have a long-distance relationship.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi runs into Seiya and is annoyed by his cocky attitude. The next day, Seiya and the rest of Three Lights have transferred to her school.

programme.title: Sailor Moon

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Three Lights are rehearsing for their upcoming musical. But they seem to have a hard time winning the approval of the stage director.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un médico abre el pecho de una enfermera y toma su corazón en su mano, en un esfuerzo desesperado por salvarle la vida.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una mujer joven es llevada de urgencia a la sala de emergencias luego de ser mordida en la cara por un perro.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una estudiante universitaria llega a urgencias con la cara cubierta por una máscara de yeso; los médicos están desconcertados cuando el corazón de un paciente que ha sufrido un derrame cerebral se detiene y se reanima sin intervención.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una adolescente es atravesada por el cuello en una cerca de hierro; un paciente está convencido de que se está convirtiendo en un vampiro.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un paciente es llevado a la sala de emergencias después de recibir un disparo en el muslo. Los médicos no pueden encontrar la bala y están preocupados cuando el paciente tiene dolores en el pecho.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El muslo de una mujer está atravesado con un trozo de barra de refuerzo; un hombre lleva a su novia a la sala de emergencias para un estudio de ETS, y ella es la paciente más extraña que el médico haya visto en su vida.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una dama de honor se encuentra en un coma peligroso; el globo ocular de un hombre sale de su cabeza; un bebé prematuro es abandonado en el baño del hospital y debe ser revivido rápidamente en la sala de emergencias.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un vaquero trastornado está empapado en sudor, saliva y orina, y nadie sabe por qué.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre es llevado a urgencias con una barra de 16 pulgadas que sobresale de su cuello; los médicos intentan descubrir cómo pueden eliminarlo.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una víctima de mordedura de serpiente puede morir en la sala de emergencias porque el antiveneno para salvar vidas es escaso

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: La vida después de la muerte. Dos documentos, un ataque al corazón. Sobredosis de analgésicos.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una enfermera de la sala de emergencias lleva a su marido delirante a la sala de emergencias y luego se da cuenta de que su aliento huele a bolas de naftalina.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote-controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Auction Hunters

programme.title: Auction Hunters

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Paul and Bogart concoct an entirely new strategy for an auction in Leaside: to have no strategy at all. Rick and Cindy play doctor, Ursula gets her geek on, and Roy rocks out with Canadian metal icon Robb Reiner.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: To his own amusement, Roy brings a mime to an auction in Corktown. Rick and Cindy arrive in a foul mood, Bogart hopes to whip Paul into shape, and Ursula aims to skewer the competition. Later, Roy gets a weather lesson from BT's Frank Ferragine.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: The bachelor party Roy has planned for Bogart is all anyone can talk about. Before the party can begin, Paul and Bogart take care of some adorable business and Rick and Cindy hope to make some money at the track when they meet up with an Olympian.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Roy brings noisemakers to an auction in Emery Village but the other buyers aren't feeling it. Rick and Cindy prefer to clown around on their own time. Paul and Bogart boogie with some intergalactic performers, and all Ursula wants is a strong coffee.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Roy hires impersonators of the buyers at an auction. Paul and Bogart bond as they evade them. Rick and Cindy keep searching lockers and former NHL player Jim Thomson helps them find The Great One. Roy and Ursula's friendship blooms.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Dr. Beckett (Paul McGillion) is asked to delay his departure from Atlantis when word comes that Major Anne Teldy (Christina Cox) and her away team have stumbled onto one of Michael’s abandoned labs inside an extensive underground catacomb.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Keller and the Atlantis team meet with the Wraith, Todd, to deliver a startling proposition. Keller believes she has found a cure for the Wraiths of their need to feed on humans but requires a test subject for this breakthrough treatment.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: McKay and Ronan volunteer to assist Dr. Jennifer Keller with a medical follow-up away from Atlantis. Later, when the pair return to her, they are surprised to learn that she left earlier but a search of the village turns up no sign of her.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Stargate SG-1’s Dr. Daniel Jackson (Michael Shanks) travels to Atlantis when his research suggests that a rebellious Ancient scientist named Janus (Gildart Jackson) may have hidden a secret lab somewhere within the city.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Homeworld Command tries to convince an ally they suspect might be infiltrated by the Lucian Alliance to let them use their planet to power up and dial Destiny. Meanwhile, Rush is trapped in a simulation created by Amanda Perry.

programme.title: Stargate Universe

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Destiny discovers the survivors of an interplanetary expedition who claim their civilization, Novus, was founded two thousand years earlier by Destiny’s crew. Suddenly, they are attacked by the Drones who have discovered a way to track Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate Universe

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.desc: Touch and Go: Welcome to the New World...same as the Old World. While the Turtles attempt to assess the damage around their lair, they find that adjusting to their post-alien invasion lives might be harder than they thought.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Hunted: For a two ton reptile, Leatherhead actually makes the ideal houseguest; neat, tidy, always pays his rent on time … except for the fact that his temper is really out of control.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: H.A.T.E.: Donatello, Michelangelo and Raphael come across a band of crazed, heavily armed, alien-hating Survivalists, bent upon delivering and detonating a thermonuclear device in New York City.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Nobody's Fool: When Michelangelo and Leonardo are out getting a little night air, they cross paths with a caped crusader who ends up saving their lives. The Turtles soon learn that he's really a cop who is out to get the one man who ruined his career.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: New Blood: The "savior" of New York City, Oroku Saki, has another face: the Shredder. The turtles stumble upon the Shredder's real reason for "helping" New York.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Lesson: April asks the Turtles to help perfect her ninjitsu skills. But the Turtles are reluctant to do so and recount a story about how they once tried to take a "student" under their wing. They just weren't prepared to be teachers.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Darkness Within: When Angel's brother disappears in the Wall Street area, the turtles jump to help her. Turns out that, as a result of all the destruction from the invasion, an ancient horror has been stirred.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Mission of Gravity: The Shredder sends Stockman and Hun on a quest to retrieve an Antigravity Generator from the city of Beijing, which is still floating in the upper atmosphere, thanks to the Triceratons.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Entity Below: The Entity and his kind are awakened through a rare planetary alignment, and, harnessing great power, they proceed to start shifting the tectonic plates in order to bring back their world.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Time Travails: The turtles get sucked into a time travelling adventure by the somewhat vapid but totally cute Renet, Apprentice Timestress.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Hun on the Run: Hun's always been loyal, but too many failures have tarnished his relationship with his master. But, when Karai is captured by Bishop, the Shredder gives Hun a mission in which he can redeem himself: save Karai and bring her back alive.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Reality Check: Ultimate Drako is back and he's causing all sorts of chaos with the Time Scepter. He's sent the four turtles spinning through time into alternate realities.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Across The Universe: Because of Ultimate Drako's machinations, Raphael finds himself in an alternate reality … of the Planet Racers. This right down Raphael's alley … until that alley turns into a dead end and he's heading right for it!

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Same as it Never Was: Ultimate Drako's time manipulations have sent Donatello to an alternate reality … and it's not pretty. It's one possible future, a horrible nightmare. The Shredder is all powerful.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Real World - Part 1: Ultimate Drako is causing trouble with the Time Scepter. He blasts Leonardo into another dimension … Usagi Yojimbo's dimension.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Real World - Part 2: Leonardo and Usagi arrive in the Battle Nexus hoping for a way to reunite the four turtles and their master. But, they find the Battle Nexus under the control of the evil Ultimate Drako. Master Splinter is his prisoner.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Bishop's Gambit: Bishop is back and making his move. His research demands a mutated specimen closer to human … a rat: Master Splinter. Bishop kidnaps Splinter and moves to finish the creation of his genetically enhanced super soldiers.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Exodus - Part 1: Splinter receives a vision of his Master Yoshi…and a mission. He must stop the Shredder. Time is running out. He doesn't know how to explain it to his sons, but they need no explanation. They're with their father to the bitter end.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Exodus - Part 2: The Shredder is leaving earth in a spaceship of his own construction intent upon wreaking havoc on the Utroms and the galaxy. But, he's taken on some unwanted passengers and, they're not about to let the Shredder get away.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Cousin Sid: Casey and April bring the Turtles and Splinter to Casey's farmhouse to heal up from the beating they took in the final fight with the Shredder. But before they can start to recover, Casey's cousin Sid crashes the scene…

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: In this follow-up to 'Even Nice People,' Gillespie’s daughter, Lana Farran, continues to defend her home from her mother’s greedy ex-boyfriend Carl DeLissa and the mob who are willing to go to great lengths to acquire and develop it, even murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Harriet DeLong’s son Eugene teams up with a prison pastor, Bishop William Prinn, to get his father, Vic Glendon, off death row, but when Prinn is traveling to Sparta, he finds his life is in danger when his car is run off the highway by a stranger.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The town council decides not to renew Bill Gillespie’s contract, pushing him into a sudden retirement. As the new Sparta police chief, Hampton Forbes, arrives from Memphis, a young boy emulates the violence he sees on television and shoots a man.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: While a deliriously happy Madison helps new love Brett Hayward move in with her, Steve investigates the brutal slaying of palastic surgeon Dr. Yordsberg.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Roger and Lana's marriage is rocky at best. Lana plots for her lover to kill Roger while he is away for the night on business so that she can have all of his money.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: While driving, David tells his wife Laura that he wants a divorce. Laura becomes hysterical and begins to cry and hit him. Trying to fight off his wife's attacks, David loses control of the car and flies into an intersection.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jim, the hospital janitor, teaches Dr. Sloan some magic tricks. Jim is a whiz at magic and can nimbly manipulate a medallion between his fingers.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The Sparta jail descends into complete and utter chaos when the six wives of a bigamist (guest star Ted Lange) all show up to visit and shower him with gifts. But when the man turns up dead in his cell, which of his wives turns out to be a murderer?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: An escaped convict and his girlfriend leave a trail of bodies in their wake as they travel through Mississippi and eventually take Althea and Scooter, the grandson of one of their victims, as hostages in a desperate bid for freedom.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: (1/1) Twenty years after a young woman is gruesomely murdered, a similar crime is committed where the victim's heart is removed. (2/2) Chief Bill Gillespie and Chief Detective Virgil Tibbs continue to work together to solve the murder of a young woman.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A respected citizen and prominent businessman of Sparta (Wallace Wilkinson) is mysteriously murdered after a dedication ceremony for a statue he created in the town center...and his family is the prime suspects as a dark family secret is revealed.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse's new part-time job as a trainer of the pro basketball Mustangs turns deadly when he's accused of murdering a star player.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan investigates a plastic surgeon when an actress's death apparently results from an infection contracted during surgery.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark and Amanda are assigned to the task force investigating an airplane crash. An adversarial FBI agent and Russian mobsters make their assignment more difficult.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.desc: Jesse finally reunites with his father. After they narrowly elude an assassin, Jesse begins to realize his father isn't the accountant he's always claimed to be, but rather a spy. The Travis's attempt to discover who's sending the killers.

programme.desc: A dead mime leads to an investigation of a crooked auto dealer. Randy Wolfe, a woman who's apparently an expert at everything, leads the investigation while continually annoying Steve.

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For homicide investigators, it's a race against time as they track their deadliest foe: a serial killer for whom killing is the only way to feel alive.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at the bottom of the basement stairs. As detectives look into the accident, they begin to question the sequence of events.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.desc: Lucas and Mark attempt to reform a con-man.

programme.desc: A lively old lady arrives in town hot on the trail of a notorious bandit and the reward money for capturing him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A deathbed request from an old friend sends Lucas to a neighboring town in search of the man's long-lost sweetheart.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: While Lucas is in Wyoming on the trail of a gang illegally selling weapons to the Indians, Mark stays with Miss Milly, where he suffers from loneliness and doubt with his father gone for 2 months.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas looks for answers when recovering alcoholic Micah Torrence returns to the bottle and turns in his badge.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: Lucas tries to get help when he is shot after witnessing a murder.

programme.desc: Lucas allows some snowed-in stagecoach passengers to stay with him until the roads are passable. Trouble brews when the whiskey salesman and gunfighter fall for the same woman.

programme.desc: Two pranksters write away for a mail-order bride, using Lucas's name.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy, whose skills in the kitchen aren't exactly sharp, invites a gourmet to share a home-cooked dinner, then pleads with Jack to be her secret stand-in-chef.

programme.title: Shane Mosley vs Antonio Margarito
programme.desc: On January 24th, 2009 Shane Mosley and Antonio Margarito fought for WBA Super World Welterweight title at the Staples Center in Los Angeles with what was supposed to be a 12 round bout only went nine resulting in a victory for Mosley.

programme.title: Shane Mosley vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On June 17th, 2000 Shane Mosley faced Oscar De la Hoya for the first time for the IBA and WBC World welterweight titles at the Staples Center in Los Angeles the bout went a full 12 rounds ending with a split decision win for Mosley.

programme.title: Shane Mosley vs Oscar De La Hoya 2
programme.desc: On September 13th, 2003 Shane Mosley and Oscar De La Hoya battled for a second time for the IBA, WBA and, WBC Super welterweight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that lasted 12 rounds continuing the reign of Mosley securing his win.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Ayub Kalule
programme.desc: On June 25th, 1981 Sugar Ray Leonard faced Ayub Kalule for the WBA World Super Welterweight title at the Astrodome in Houston that ended by technical knockout in the ninth round giving Leonard the win.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Davey Boy Green
programme.desc: On March 31st, 1980 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Davey Boy Green for the WBC World Welterweight titles at the Capitol Center in Landover in a bout that went 4 out of 15 rounds ending with a knockout victory for Leonard.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Marvin Hagler
programme.desc: On April 6th, 1987 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Marvin Hagler for the WBC World Middleweight title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas in a twelve round bout that resulted in a split decision in favor of Leonard.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Thomas Hearns
programme.desc: On September 16th, 1981 Sugar Ray Leonard faced Thomas Hearns for the WBA and WBC World welterweight titles at the Caesars Palace in Las Vegas resulting in a win by technical knockout for Leonard and went on to be the 1981 Fight of the year.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Wilfred Benitez
programme.desc: On November 30th, 1979 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Wilfred Benitez for the WBC World Welterweight title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas that went 15 rounds but ended in technical knockout giving the victory to Leonard.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs Pedro Campa
programme.desc: On August 13th, 2022, Teofimo Lopez fought Pedro Campa for the NABF & WBO International Super Lightweight Titles in Las Vegas. Teofimo looked confident and quick from the start, wearing down Campa until he finally stopped him in the 7th round.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs Vasiliy Lomachenko
programme.desc: On October 17th, 2020 Teofimo Lopez and Vasiliy Lomachenko battled for IBF, WBA and WBO World Lightweight title in The Bubble at MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a 12 round bout that ended in victory for Lopez.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs William Silva
programme.desc: On July 14th, 2018 Teofimo Lopez and William Silva fought for the vacant WBC Continental Americas lightweight titles with Silva going down 3 times Lopez secured the technical knockout win in the sixth round.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Andre Gorges
programme.desc: On April 14th, 2012 Terence Crawford fought Andre Gorges at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas in a bout that was set for 6 round and lasted 5 with a win by knockout victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Jose Benavidez Jr
programme.desc: On October 13th, 2018, Terence Crawford fought Jose Benavidez Jr for the WBO World Welterweight Title in Omaha, Nebraska. In a dominant performance, Crawford showed out in front of his hometown, delivering a TKO in the final round.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Julius Indongo
programme.desc: On August 19th, 2017 Terence Crawford fought Julius Indongo for the IBF, WBA, WBC and WBO World Super Lightweight titles at the Pinnacle Bank Arena in Lincoln the bout ended in the third round by knockout securing the victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Kell Brook
programme.desc: On November 14th, 2020 Terence Crawford battled Kell Brook for the WBO World Welterweight title in The Bubble at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas resulting in a fourth round technical knockout victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Shawn Porter
programme.desc: On November 20th, 2021, Terence Crawford fought Shawn Porter for the WBO World Welterweight Title at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. In a very close fight, Crawford turned it up and put on the pressure late, delivering a TKO in the 10th round.

programme.desc: In the powerhouse season finale, Chad and Evelyn get into it when Evelyn spots him having lunch with another woman. Also, Jen's wild divorce party heats up when her date for the evening arrives. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: The explosive fourth season opens in NY to reveal Jen & Evelyn's ten-year friendship on the rocks. Two new ladies are also introduced to the mix: wife/aspiring singer Kenya Bell & ex-fiancée/professional dancer Kesha Nichols.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Evelyn and Chad meet to discuss social media accusations of infidelity, the ladies discover some shocking videos of Kenya online, and Royce is up for an off-Broadway show.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Shaunie, Evelyn, & Tami take Kenya to task overthrowing Kesha under the bus at her music video auditions, Suzie's behavior at a charity event raises eyebrows, & Tami takes to the therapist's couch to combat her anger issues.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Tami sees red over Kesha talking behind her back. Also, the ladies are conspicuously absent from one of Jen's lip gloss launch events.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Shaunie's birthday party goes south when Evelyn attacks Jen over loyalty and how she's changed in the spotlight of fame. Also, Suzie and Royce drop in on Kesha's family farm in North Carolina while en route to Miami.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: The fallout from Jen and Ev's confrontation at Shaunie's birthday party continues, and Ev lays into Kenya for calling her "loose."

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Kenya tries to explain herself after some nasty gossip loops back to Evelyn, but things really heat up when Kesha brings in a friend to corroborate her version of the story.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Evelyn and Kenya's feud over loose talk escalates to the point of no return. Also, Suzie's penchant for peacemaking returns as she takes a stab at squashing Royce and Jen's beef.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: A trip to the races turns explosive when Evelyn's friend and assistant Nia challenges Jen's recent behavior. Also, Tami and her mother work through some of their issues.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: The fallout from Evelyn, Jen, and Nia's altercation at the racetrack deepens the divides within the group. Also, Royce introduces boyfriend Dezmon Briscoe to the girls.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Evelyn and Chad discuss their upcoming wedding while Royce and her father get into it over Royce's relationship with football player Dezmon Briscoe.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: The ladies leave Miami behind for a girls' trip to Tahiti, setting the stage for an epic showdown between Tami and Kesha.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Reverend Tuttle is aboard the stagecoach when it is robbed by three masked gunmen. Sheriff Hollister suspects Big Jim Sten, boss of a nearby town, is behind the robbery. But when the reverend and Hollister visit Sten's town, a secret is revealed.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Jett Sergeant, son of a notorious outlaw, sees Hollister kill his father in a shootout and vows he will kill the Sheriff. Clay tries to set him straight, but the youth teams up with two of his father's henchmen in a plot a murder the Sheriff.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Recently released from prison, Frank Leslie returns to Tombstone to marry the widow of the man he killed and pledges never to use guns again. But four brothers of Leslie's victim come to Tombstone intent on revenge, putting his oath to the test.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Gallant Bat Masterson ransoms a Medal of Honor, in an adventure with heartless men. Thieves steal the most priceless possession of Mrs. Dalbot, the widow of a National hero, and Bat sets out to get it back.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: The town of Las Tables is about to hang three men - Bat Masterson finds Marshal MacWilliams' son hiding in the Las Tables graveyard - It's a much less macabre place than the town, itself, where three men are about to be hanged.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: The town of Meeker, Colorado is made frightful by the invasion of three men set upon killing one of its women. Bat Masterson interferes.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson is on the scene when horse thieves Cat and Jesse Crail try to trigger a war between two Indian tribes. Purpose of the Crail maneuver: They plan to steal the Indians' horses while the braves are at each others' throats.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Army Civilian Scout Bat Masterson (Gene Barry) nearly gets his neck stretched in an affair involving Colorado politics when he finds he needs to extricate himself from a capitol charge arising from a Major's ravenous political ambitions.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: When Bat arrives in Lordsbury to meet a friend, he changes his mind, making a 'different appointment,' instead. Three power-hungry ranchers and Lordsbury's top lawman have ganged up on Bat's friend and killed him.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When a convicted killer escapes prison, Josh is hired for $500 to protect the woman whose testimony put him there.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides into a town looking for a man who asked him to come there for a job that pays $500.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is hired by Harry Weaver to track down his twin brother Pete, who's wanted with a $500 bounty on him.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is called in to track down a new outlaw - the local sheriff who is a friend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh reluctantly takes a job protecting a beautiful deaf, mute, teenage girl and keeping everyone off the father's place for a day or two.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh escorts an East Coast photographer to take a picture of his friend El Gato (The Cat), who is a famous, hilarious bandit living in the hills of Mexico with a small army.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Ringo's girlfriend is trying to get him to turn his life around, so he goes to Old Man Clanton and tells him he wants to leave the gang.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The wife of a wounded outlaw takes him to Tombstone for medical attention as he has decided to go straight. Earp learns who he is but doesn't trust him.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Morgan Earp has been having a streak of good luck in Tombstone's gambling houses but Wyatt wants to get him to quit while he's still ahead and return to his old self.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: An old prospector stumbles into a saloon saying he has been robbed and murdered. He is suffering from a shot that creased his head and mumbling that he had $50,000 in gold stolen from him.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wyatt jails the McLowery brothers for robbery. Soon afterwards, however, he is enraged to learn that, because the McLowerys work for Old Man Clanton, they've been released by Sheriff Behan.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp meets the wife of a man who was convicted of theft and sentenced to Yuma prison where escaped prisoners are tracked and killed by Apaches for the reward.

programme.title: The Californians
programme.desc: The Bandanna Gang is on the rampage, so Matt agrees to escort a group of settlers to San Francisco.

programme.title: The Californians
programme.desc: Marshal Wayne suspects a con when a married couple start selling stock in a gold mine.

programme.title: The Californians
programme.desc: When a series of stage holdups occurs, Matt is sworn in as a US marshal so he can take the case.

programme.title: The Californians
programme.desc: Sam Crawford, the Prince of Thieves, comes to town and offers Marshal Wayne a percentage of all his ill gotten gains for his help. But Marshal Wayne arrests Sam Crawford for bribery and while jailed Crawford is able to rob a stagecoach.

programme.title: The Californians
programme.desc: A dying man's last request takes Matt to sinister Hangtown.

programme.title: The Californians

programme.title: Love Island

programme.title: Love Island
